script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
KAYE_OID=53ef6cdf-3955-4ba5-a361-cef88ea6071a
REAL_APP_ID=c5d5dbb3-f135-4cc2-8a59-3b4dfba95600

echo '=== Mint AppPublisher token (for read) ==='
RT_AP=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token-appcatalog --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
AT_AP=$(curl -sS -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=9f4cd925-fcc7-4f42-8dc2-ae98bcad28a6" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" --data-urlencode "refresh_token=$RT_AP" \
  --data-urlencode "scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All offline_access" 2>/dev/null \
  | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
echo "  token: ${#AT_AP} chars"

echo '=== STEP A: GET on REAL teamsApp.id to verify it exists ==='
GET_CODE=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/real_app -w '%{http_code}' \
  "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$REAL_APP_ID" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT_AP")
echo "  GET status: $GET_CODE"
echo '  body:'
cat /tmp/real_app | python3 -m json.tool 2>&1 | head -20
if [ "$GET_CODE" != "200" ]; then
  echo "FAIL: teamsApp.id $REAL_APP_ID is not reachable. STOP."; exit 1
fi

echo '=== STEP B: Mint YooMD chat token for the install ==='
RT_YM=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
AT_YM=$(curl -sS -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" --data-urlencode "refresh_token=$RT_YM" \
  --data-urlencode "scope=https://graph.microsoft.com/.default offline_access" 2>/dev/null \
  | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
echo "  YooMD token: ${#AT_YM} chars"
if [ ${#AT_YM} -lt 200 ]; then echo "FAIL: YooMD token mint failed"; exit 1; fi

echo '=== STEP C: Install Kaye AI for Kaye Elamparo ==='
INST_RESP=$(curl -sS -w '\n__HTTP_CODE__:%{http_code}' -X POST \
  "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/$KAYE_OID/teamwork/installedApps" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT_YM" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"teamsApp@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$REAL_APP_ID\"}")
INST_CODE=$(echo "$INST_RESP" | grep -o '__HTTP_CODE__:[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2)
INST_BODY=$(echo "$INST_RESP" | sed -e 's/__HTTP_CODE__:[0-9]*$//')
echo "  Install POST status: $INST_CODE"
echo "  Install body: $(echo "$INST_BODY" | head -c 500)"
if [ "$INST_CODE" = "403" ]; then
  echo "NOTE: 403 — per playbook Rule 2, the GET above already confirmed app exists (200), so this is a real policy block. Escalate via Teams Admin Center, not a re-upload."
fi

echo '=== STEP D: Verify Kaye now has the app in her installedApps list ==='
REAL_APP_ID="$REAL_APP_ID" curl -sS -G \
  "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/$KAYE_OID/teamwork/installedApps" \
  --data-urlencode '$expand=teamsApp' \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT_YM" 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import json,sys,os
try:
  d=json.load(sys.stdin)
  if d.get("error"):
    print("  ERROR:", d["error"])
  else:
    target=os.environ.get("REAL_APP_ID","")
    apps=d.get("value",[])
    print(f"  Kayes installedApps total: {len(apps)}")
    match=[a for a in apps if (a.get("teamsApp") or {}).get("id")==target]
    if match:
      ta=match[0]["teamsApp"]
      print(f"  MATCH: name={ta.get(\"displayName\")} dist={ta.get(\"distributionMethod\")} id={ta.get(\"id\")}")
      print("  INSTALL VERIFIED")
    else:
      print("  NOT VISIBLE YET — may be eventually consistent. Re-check in 1-2 min.")
except Exception as e: print("  parse-err:", e)'

echo '=== SAVE FOREVER ==='
echo "  Kaye teamsApp.id:    $REAL_APP_ID"
echo "  Manifest externalId: 515f7dd8-cede-4e89-8012-a861e0a71f3d"
echo "  Future version updates: POST /v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$REAL_APP_ID/appDefinitions"
echo '===END==='
